common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: This API creates a shipping document job for selected documents. The system receives requests and returns a job ID along with success and failure details.

request_params.description: The type of shipping document. Available values: THERMAL_UNPACKAGED_LABEL
request_params.name: shipping_document_type

request_params.description:
List of Unpackaged SKUs to generate labels for.


Note: The unpackaged_sku_requests and package_list cannot be populated at the same time, please select one.
request_params.name: unpackaged_sku_requests

children.description: Number of copies for the generated labels (maximum 600 total across all requested SKUs).
children.name: quantity

request_params.description:
List of Package Numbers to generate labels for. (maximum 600 total)


Note: The unpackaged_sku_requests and package_list cannot be populated at the same time, please select one.
request_params.name: package_list

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking.
Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

children.description: Generated Job ID which will be used for status tracking and download the Shipping Document
children.name: job_id

children.description: List of Package Number or Unpackaged SKU ID that succeeds in generating Shipping Document
children.name: success_id_list

children.description: List of Package Numbers or Unpackaged SKUs that failed in generating Shipping Document
children.name: fail_list

children.description: Package Number or Unpackaged SKU ID that failed in generating Shipping Document
children.name: id

children.description: Indicate error type if one element hit error.
children.name: fail_error

children.description: Indicate error details if one element hit error.
children.name: fail_message
children.sample: Wrong parameters, detail: This Unpackaged SKU ID is not eligible for printing. Reason: Invalid SKU ID.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/create_shipping_document_job?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "shipping_document_type": "THERMAL_UNPACKAGED_LABEL",
    "unpackaged_sku_requests": [
        {
            "quantity": 10,
            "unpackaged_sku_id": "844091087_11192347"
        }
    ]
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
